milestones.title: Foundation & First Project
milestones.unlock_statement: Riya, you'll push your first Python project to a real GitHub repo and explain every line you wrote in a 5-minute code review.

milestones.title: Core Skills Unlocked
milestones.unlock_statement: You will walk into a screening call at a product company and describe your SQL project end-to-end in 90 seconds without hesitating.

milestones.title: Junior Dev Ready
milestones.unlock_statement: Riya, you'll sit in a team meeting and contribute to a technical discussion about a real-world problem, using your Python and HTML skills.

milestones.title: Mid-Level Engineer
milestones.unlock_statement: You will lead a small project, designing and implementing a feature from scratch, and then presenting it to your team, showcasing your problem-solving skills.

milestones.title: Senior Engineer
milestones.unlock_statement: Riya, you'll be the go-to person for technical guidance in your team, helping junior engineers with their projects and mentoring them to success.

milestones.title: Technical Lead
milestones.unlock_statement: You will architect a large-scale system, considering scalability, performance, and security, and then present your design to the company's technical leadership.

milestones.title: Technical Expert
milestones.unlock_statement: Riya, you'll be a recognized expert in your field, speaking at conferences, writing articles, and guiding the technical direction of your company, making a real impact on the industry.
